name: Revolut AU
one_liner: Multi-currency fintech card with no FX fees on everyday purchases and competitive exchange rates.
benefit: Spend in local currency with no FX surcharge up to the free-plan monthly limit; instant currency exchange at interbank-like rates; virtual cards for online security; AU bank account details; budgeting tools.
signup_bonus: ~$20–50 AUD for new users who sign up via referral and make qualifying spend (check current terms)
referral_note: Get a referral via OzBargain's referral threads/randomiser so both you and the referrer get the bonus.

how_to_join.action: Get a referral link from OzBargain's Revolut referral thread
Download the Revolut app (iOS or Android) and sign up using the referral link
Verify your identity in-app with a passport or driver's licence
Add funds and make the qualifying spend to unlock the signup bonus

risks: Free-plan has a monthly FX-free limit; a 0.5% surcharge applies on amounts above the limit on weekdays
Weekend FX rates include a markup vs the weekday interbank rate — avoid large conversions on weekends
Signup bonus terms change frequently — verify at time of signup
est_value: ~$20–50 signup bonus + saves ~2–3% FX fees on travel and international purchases
